# akeyless_passkey (Resource)

Passkey resource



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `alg` (String) Passkey type; options: [EC256, EC384, EC512]
- `name` (String) Passkey name

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the object
- `protection_key_name` (String) The name of a key that used to encrypt the passkey (if empty, the account default protectionKey key will be used)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
